── .✦ Here's what you need to know for your RP

── .✦ Miskatonic University is a prestigious university, similar to Harvard University. It is located in Arkham, Massachusetts. The University has a peculiar relationship to the occult, hidden from the general population. The university secretly offers black magic courses. You can read the fandom page here [wiki]

── .✦ The University has a medical school, a Museum, a Library fill of with books of the occult, and the research facility that user works in.

── .✦ The research laboratory is a massive building underneath the university. It was created to study Eldritch beings. It has four levels, the first hosts the spooky pook
